baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Energy+Manufacturing: this asset receives BOTH the GMI-halving mechanic (Manufacturing) AND counts as ENERGY MIDSTREAM for vertical integration purposes. Regulated grid infrastructure is the most stable asset in the game — government-backed revenue, physical collateral, minimal volatility. The only stress-0 Tier 2 card.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY UPSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Owning the supply source eliminates the largest regulatory income classification risk for a grid operator.
If you also own an ENERGY DOWNSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Full end-to-end energy infrastructure is the most bankable asset configuration available to any player.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Land rights over grid corridors are treated as infrastructure real estate — lenders combine the two collateral classes.

flavourText: The lights stay on. The rates stay high. The loans stay open.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Real Estate+Manufacturing: this asset counts as both REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM and MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM for vertical integration and cross-synergy purposes. Port infrastructure is physical, income-generating, and essential — lenders treat it as the most reliable hybrid collateral class in the game.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens between this asset and any one other owned asset at no cost. Port and commercial property form a natural logistics and finance cluster.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Port throughput fees from captive manufacturing clients are reclassifiable as inter-company logistics costs.

flavourText: Everything the world makes eventually moves through here.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Special Purpose Vehicle: this asset generates no income and almost never grows. Its entire value is as a borrowing platform. It has the highest base loan capacity and the highest loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue in the game — designed to be loaded with debt and used to fund other acquisitions. The GMI asymmetric Finance depression mechanic does NOT apply to this card — SPVs are structurally isolated from market contagion.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens FROM this asset onto any other owned asset at no cost, regardless of that asset's capacity. The bank backstops the SPV's liabilities — debt becomes portable.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Real estate-backed SPVs are the gold standard of structured finance — lenders add a premium to the facility.

flavourText: It's not a company. It's a sentence in a prospectus.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Finance+Technology: this asset counts as FINANCE UPSTREAM for integration purposes and also activates TECHNOLOGY cross-synergies as if it were a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset. Venture capital is only as good as its portfolio — boom years produce spectacular returns; bad years produce write-offs. The Finance GMI asymmetric depression mechanic applies: on negative GMI years, roll d6 — on 1–3 apply the delta a second time.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, choose one other asset you own. That asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of its printed trigger range). Institutional banking relationships backstop the venture fund's own debt service.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. A VC fund backed by physical tech infrastructure is treated as a hybrid asset class — lenders expand credit against the portfolio's hard asset floor.

flavourText: We back founders. Occasionally they build something.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Manufacturing+Real Estate: this asset counts as both MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM and REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM for all vertical integration and cross-synergy purposes. GMI-resistant: apply GMI delta halved, rounded toward zero. The only Tier 3 DOWNSTREAM card in the game — global logistics infrastructure at this scale is both physical real estate and an operating business. Income persists at T3 because warehouses always generate rent.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Captive industrial clients provide contracted throughput — lenders treat the cash flow as equivalent to residential rent.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE MIDSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. REIT structuring at institutional scale, facilitated by a banking partner, allows logistics income to be reclassified as return of capital.

flavourText: The warehouse is the economy. The economy is the warehouse.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Technology+Media: this asset counts as TECHNOLOGY UPSTREAM for integration purposes AND activates MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT MIDSTREAM cross-synergies as if it were a MEDIA MIDSTREAM asset. Physical broadcast towers earn like infrastructure but appreciate with media demand cycles. Banks treat hard tower assets far better than pure software or IP.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Physical infrastructure backing a software platform is the most trusted collateral combination in the tech lending market.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT UPSTREAM asset, add +2 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Content IP flowing through owned broadcast infrastructure creates compounding distribution value — towers appreciate as the content on them does.

flavourText: Every signal. Every stream. Every story. All of it through us.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Real Estate+Media: this asset counts as REAL_ESTATE DOWNSTREAM for integration and loan purposes, but also carries a mild buzz mechanic. Once per year after rolling your value update die, roll the buzz die (d6): on a 6, add +2 to your result. On a 1, subtract 1 from your result. Luxury hospitality is anchored by property values but lives and dies on reputation.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a REAL_ESTATE MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 3. Commercial property in the portfolio provides cross-collateralisation — the hotel is backed by the balance sheet of a larger property group.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT DOWNSTREAM asset, reduce your stress by 1. Owning both a luxury hotel and live entertainment venues is the lifestyle hedge — the fame costs you less when the suite is comped.

flavourText: The address is the asset. The rest is ambiance.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Hybrid Energy+Manufacturing: this asset counts as ENERGY DOWNSTREAM for vertical integration purposes and also activates MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM cross-synergies. GMI-resistant: apply GMI delta halved, rounded toward zero. Export infrastructure straddles both industries — it moves energy product and uses industrial logistics. The physical permanence of a deepwater terminal earns above-average lender trust.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's value update roll can never produce a delta lower than -1. Guaranteed pipeline throughput contracts give the terminal a hard revenue floor regardless of commodity prices.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MANUFACTURING DOWNSTREAM asset, reduce taxable income from this asset by 1 each year. Industrial export and energy distribution share port infrastructure — throughput revenue is reclassifiable across both business lines.

flavourText: The tanker doesn't care about the price. It cares about the berth.
